mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_od_fitness WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY eval_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_od_fitness WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_od_fitness (worker_name, dept, disease, eval_date, eval_org, eval_result, recommendation, done_status, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{dept}, #{disease}, #{evalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{evalOrg}, #{evalResult}, #{recommendation}, #{doneStatus}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_od_fitness SET worker_name = #{workerName}, dept = #{dept}, disease = #{disease}, eval_date = #{evalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, eval_org = #{evalOrg}, eval_result = #{evalResult}, recommendation = #{recommendation}, done_status = #{doneStatus}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_od_fitness SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
